aeo_readiness.summary: The Climate Pros has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks several critical elements to maximize visibility and search performance. The website has some relevant content and a clear service focus but misses out on schema markup, NAP consistency, and comprehensive content depth.
quick_wins: Implement schema markup to enhance search engine understanding of the business and its services.
Increase the number of customer reviews on Google to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand the blog and service pages with more detailed, keyword-rich content about HVAC services and energy rebates.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not actively managed, with no reviews or engagement. This significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: Lack of regular updates or posts on GBP.
Missing relevant business information or attributes in GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has a consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on its website but lacks citations across major directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Actively manage and update NAP information to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Search engines and AI crawlers struggle to understand the business context and service offerings.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing basic schema markup for LocalBusiness and Service types.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, detailed content that targets HVAC and energy rebate-related keywords to establish the business as an authority in the field.

page_title: The Climate Pros | Denver & Front Range HVAC Installation, Repair & Maintenance
